title: Save and verify your alert rule

blocks.content: Save your alert rule and verify it appears in the alert rules list.
Click **Save rule and exit**. Grafana saves your rule and immediately begins checking it at the interval you configured.
Verify your rule appears in the alert rules list. Navigate to **Alerting > Alert rules** and locate your rule in the **Grafana QuickPizza Demo Dashboards** folder.

Your alert rule is saved and actively monitoring the Quick Pizza application. Grafana checks the rule every minute, and if request duration stays above your threshold for 5 minutes, you'll receive a notification.
